name: Your boss's Ass
short_description: This is a work companion desktop pet. Set your daily off-duty time and let the desktop pet accompany you through work! It will regularly remind you to do pelvic exercises, drink water, and take walks. When encountering overtime work, it will even complain about the boss to you.
detailed_description:
Silent Ass

Drag it to the screen edge and it will snap to the border. No large icons on the taskbar - find it through the hidden icons tray for easier access during work hours.

Considerate Ass

Been working too long? Get up and stretch! Do some Kegel exercises to prevent hemorrhoids! Stay hydrated for better health! More thoughtful than your boss - while it can't pay your salary, it does consume your boss's electricity (even just a tiny bit), which technically means you're getting some petty revenge.

Work Companion Ass

Set your daily off-duty time. If you're unlucky enough to work overtime, Butt will vent about your boss to provide emotional support. Just remember to dismiss the messages promptly - wouldn't want the boss to see!

Workshop Available

You can share your boss's ass now!

May all players encounter bosses who never demand overtime and pay generous salaries! Wishing you the best!

Notice

The game's boss-complaining dialogue may contain sharp language (including profanity), but there is no nudity or sexual content.
